character.definition: to pull up the sleeves and show the arms, to fight with bare hands, to desire for more than one's rightful share; to covet; greedy
name of a variety of bamboo; (Cant.) 䈊仔, a useless fellow
broad; wide; spacious; vast, to turn red from shame or embarrassment; to blush, to be ashamed
food items merely arranged for display purpose only; not to be eaten; to set out fruit, etc., in plates arranged only for show
soil, earth; items made of earth
preserved and dried meat, (a dialect) fried; cooked small pieces of meat, meat broth
